schema.description: A page object with links to move to other pages and the list of objects.

first.description: The link to the first page.

id.description: The id: it's now a unique id, but a row index.

keys.description: The keys for the current data, matching the provided `dimensions` in the query.

items.description: The keys for the current data, matching the provided `dimensions` in the query.

score.description: A score to spot traffic opportunities, from 0.0 to 1.0 (the higher the better). The score is based on the traffic data.

last.description: The link to the last page.

next.description: The link to the next page or `null` if there's no page.

prev.description: The link to the previous page or `null` if there's no page.

self.description: The link to the current page.

schema.title: PageWebsiteSearch
